name: Trendio — Local Dev

values.description: Django dev server base URL. Change port if you use a different one.
For Swagger UI and OpenAPI schema endpoints.

Initial password for the test user.
Used in Change Password and Reset Password requests.
⚠️ MANUAL: Copy the 6-digit OTP from your Django terminal logs into this field before running OTP Verify or Reset Password.

Auto-set by Login. Stores the logged-in user's email.

description:
Local development environment for Trendio backend API testing.

--- SETUP ---
1. Import this file into Postman via Environments → Import
2. Select 'Trendio — Local Dev' as your active environment
3. Start your Django server: python manage.py runserver
4. Run requests in order: Register → Login → everything else

--- OTP TESTING ---
When DEBUG=True, OTP codes are printed in your Django terminal:
[DEV] OTP for 9876543210: 483921
Copy that 6-digit code into the 'otp_code' variable before running OTP Verify.
